title: viguiera tucumanensis var. discoidea
intro: Viguiera tucumanensis var. discoidea is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine in Argentina and other regions for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, Viguiera tucumanensis var. discoidea has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
